Chat.title: Footnote
Chat.tagline: Ask a question about your documents – every answer is backed by its source.
Chat.empty: No questions yet. Ask your first question below.
Chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Chat.quotaExhausted: The daily quota of all models has been reached. Please try again later.

Workspace.noChatSelected: Pick a chat on the left or create a new one.
Workspace.emptyTitle: Choose the knowledge base for this chat
Workspace.emptyHint: Add documents to start this chat.

Documents.panelSubtitle: These documents apply to this chat.
Documents.confirmDeleteDoc: Delete “{title}” permanently from the library? Its text chunks will be removed too. This cannot be undone.
Documents.confirmDeleteDocUsed: “{title}” is used in {count, plural, one {# chat} other {# chats}} and will be removed there too. Delete it permanently from the library? Its text chunks will be deleted as well — this cannot be undone.

Ingest.title: Upload document
Ingest.description: Upload a .md, .txt or .pdf file (max. 4 MB). It will be parsed, split into chunks and stored as embeddings.
Ingest.created: {count, plural, one {# chunk stored} other {# chunks stored}} – “{title}”.
Ingest.exists: “{title}” already exists ({count, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}}).

validation.too-large: The file is too large (max. 4 MB).

extractError.empty: No readable text in the file.
extractError.empty-or-scanned: No readable text – possibly a scanned PDF without a text layer.
extractError.ocr-failed: Text recognition (OCR) failed. Please try again later (quota may be exhausted or the document too large).
